label: 1564 CE
era_summary: Year 1564 (MDLXIV) was a leap year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1564: Spain, Venice-Turkey, Tripoli, 1559-65. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1564: Portugal-Moluccans (Ternate), 1552-65; Spain, Venice-Turkey, Tripoli, 1559-65; Spain-Filipinos, 1564-67.
